fall down

- Any larger tools than allen keys must be tethered to worker.
- If required fill out harness permit (Not required) unless special condition and coordinate with CACKLE FDC
prior.

Toolbox weekly + Discussion regarding hoist incident

- No boys are to drive the material lift, talk to J&M Management or FDC to drive the lift.
- When you put the materials in the lift, exit the lift and close the gates from the outside. If someone or
another trade closes the doors, block them and alert FDC immediately
- All boys are to wear PPE and use welding screens at all times
- If you need the materials hoist to move materials or tools between floors. Talk to Scott or Jeff first do not
use the hoist yourself.
- If you do not speak english, you must be in a buddy system and stay supervised at all times onsite with
someone that speaks English.
- Shanchuang Zhang must now always be monitored and supervised by Zonggang at all times onsite as
Zonggang will be his translator.
- If you have any safety issues or problems onsite, please report it immediately and stop work.

when on-site at all times.

- Davide will be buddied with Zhangbo

Toolbox Talk - Items for Discussion

Topics of Discussion / Corrective Actions Required:
Sydney University A22/OTC Courtyard Hopper Mechanical Job
- Meeting with All J&M Artsteel Employees regarding incident that happened last Thursday 19/06/2025
- Discussion regarding FDC NCR Report Submitted by Marc Anthony FDC 22/06/2025.
Incident / Items of Issue:
J&M art steel worker Daniel Wu was doing Hot Works (welding) without using a flash screen and notifying
FDC and USYD to do a Hot Works Permit. Failure to do this is a breach of USYD and FDC policies, procedures
and a breach of J and M Art steel SWMS.
Actions to correct / Undertaken:
Company wide Toolbox talk given to all J and M Art Steel workers on the importance of when doing Hot
Works (welding) you must notify FDC and USYD before doing these works on any USYD site and FDC
projects. J&M Art Steel SWMS will be reviewed and retraining will be given to all workers across all USYD sites
and FDC projects across the division.
- Re induction to be given to all J and M Art Steel workers involved.
- Final Verbal and written warning Given to J and M Art Steel. Safety alert / lessons learnt to be given across
all FDC projects within USYD.
J&M Artsteel - Items for Discussion Company Wide
- No Workers are to start works on any site without signing in, completing permits required and ensuring
FDC is present and has approved the works.
- This is a company warning for the whole J&M Artsteel company. We cannot be non-compliant in the way we
work and we must ensure that policy and procedures are followed correctly.
- You must check with your direct J&M Manager onsite that all permits, plant pre-starts etc have been
completed prior to starting work each day or each task. If you start the day welding in 1 spot and move to
another spot, please call your manager and check that the required permits have been completed.
- if you are unsure please ask if what job you are doing requires permits.
- if you are taking the welding from the workshop onto site, you must take 2 welding blankets and 2 welding
screens with you. This is now a company policy for J&M.
